heading: Prototype demonstration of advanced nuclear reactor technology
label: 13494 Prototype demonstration of advanced nuclear reactor technology

children.heading: Solicitation of proposals
children.label: a Solicitation of proposals
children.text: Within 3 years after , the Secretary shall solicit proposals for carrying out the preliminary engineering design of not more than 2 prototype advanced nuclear reactor technologies developed by the Department of Energy, other than advanced light water reactor technologies, necessary to support a decision on whether to recommend construction of a prototype demonstration reactor with the characteristics described in . Proposals submitted under this subsection shall be for modular design concepts of sufficient size to address requirements related to the certification of a standardized design.October 24, 1992section 13493(a) of this title

children.label: A
children.text: specify a preferred technology or technologies;

children.label: B
children.text: include detailed information on milestones for construction and operation;

children.label: C
children.text: include an estimate of the funding requirements; and

children.label: D
children.text: specify the extent and type of non-Federal financial support anticipated.

The prototype demonstration program under this section shall be carried out to the maximum extent practicable with private sector funding. At least 50 percent of the funding for such program shall be non-Federal funding. The extent of non-Federal cost sharing proposed for any demonstration project shall be a criterion for the selection of the project.

children.heading: Selection of technology
children.label: c Selection of technology
children.text: Any technology selected by the Secretary for recommendation for prototype demonstration under this section shall to the maximum extent possible exhibit the characteristics set forth in .section 13493(a) of this title
